title: Durable knowledge reconciliation
highlights: Added structured meeting fact imports so trusted Codex context can populate titles, participants, customer accounts, projects, glossary terms, and goals without losing review gating.
Expanded the Context Library with entry lookup, confirmation, aliases, evidence, meeting links, and reconcile flows that propagate durable mappings across related meetings.
Introduced recurring knowledge discovery, brief/enrichment commands, and automatic resolver-backed reconciliation for repeated high-confidence concepts.

title: Reliable update refresh
highlights: Made explicit Barn Owl update checks refresh the live feed before deciding no newer build exists.
Prevents stale cached up-to-date state from hiding a newly published release.

title: Context Library and review clarity
highlights: Introduced Context Library management in Settings with search, type filters, entry creation, editing, and deletion.
Clarified post-meeting review so high-confidence machine context is accepted automatically while medium- and low-confidence suggestions stay review-gated.
Extended the Barn Owl CLI and Codex guidance with Context Library commands and review-aware workflows.
